highlights.text: I wrote in my Friday 4pm newsletter when we were 5662: “Bear case Monday: There is no bear case until this flag breaks down at 5588-90.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the setup that caused Tuesdays flush (my third setup type; the breakdown short) and the recent bounces (my first setup type; the failed breakdown).
This morning, we flushed the level, rallied to 5552 , lost 5519 after, sold down to 5492, then returned to the 5519 magnet by the close again.

post_title: Have Bears Run Out Of Steam Already In SPX? Sept 6 Plan
